hooks.command: if curl -sf http://localhost:37800/healthz > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[Awareness Memory] Ready. Run /awareness-memory:session-start to load context.'; elif [ -n "$AWARENESS_API_KEY" ] && [ "$AWARENESS_API_KEY" != "aw_your-api-key-here" ] && [ -n "$AWARENESS_MEMORY_ID" ] && [ "$AWARENESS_MEMORY_ID" != "your-memory-id-here" ]; then echo '[Awareness Memory] Cloud mode. Run /awareness-memory:session-start'; else echo '[Awareness Memory] Starting local daemon...'; npx -y @awareness-sdk/local start > /dev/null 2>&1 &  sleep 5; if curl -sf http://localhost:37800/healthz > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[Awareness Memory] Daemon started. Run /awareness-memory:session-start to load context.'; else echo '[Awareness Memory] Could not auto-start. Run: npx @awareness-sdk/setup'; fi; fi
